C/C FOR J. TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ATTY. DEF PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. FOR REST. PREMISES AT 715 LEAVENWORTH,#1 W/A STAY OF EVICTION TO MIDNIGHT 7-20-93. ALL RENTS WVD. EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR COSTS & ATTY FEES.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DINGLE, DAVID THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 715 LEAVENWORTH ST, #4, S.F, CA., STAYED UNTIL JUL-20-1993, WRIT FOR EVICTION MAY BE POSTED PRIOR TO EVICTION. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. MUTUAL RELEASE OF CLAIMS. SEE JUDGMENT FOR COMPLETE DETAILS.
